title: ast_reflect_gen Mod SDK syntax emission refresh

source.subject: Improve ast_reflect_gen Mod SDK syntax emission and bump corelib.

body:
## Outcome

Improve ast_reflect_gen Mod SDK syntax emission and bump corelib.

## Context

- Workstream **analysis-pipeline** — compiler pipeline and api.json spine.
- Contributes to deliverable **Platform-spec cutover** (`v02-platform-spec-cutover`).
- Corelib sources live in the **corelib** submodule; package identity is **corelib** with workspace publish to pckg.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`e16f55a`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/e16f55a) — Improve ast_reflect_gen Mod SDK syntax emission and bump corelib.
